recipe.title: Kerala roast chicken & curry sauce
recipe.description: Need a whole roast chicken recipe for the air fryer? Check out Jamie's fragrant Kerala-style roast, with cauliflower and chickpeas.

steps.descr: Press down firmly on the chicken breasts to break the...
steps.instructions: Press down firmly on the chicken breasts to break the backbone, squashing the bird slightly, then slash each thigh a few times with a sharp knife. Cut the cauli into 6 wedges, discarding any tatty outer leaves. Rub the chicken and cauli all over with 2 tablespoons each of curry paste and olive oil, a little red wine vinegar and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Press down firmly on the chicken breasts to break the backbone, squashing the bird slightly, then slash each thigh a few times with a sharp knife. Cut the cauli into 6 wedges, discarding any tatty outer leaves. Rub the chicken and cauli all over with 2 tablespoons each of curry paste and olive oil, a little red wine vinegar and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Place the chicken, breast side down, in the large...
steps.instructions: Place the chicken, breast side down, in the large air-fryer drawer and press down. Cook for 50 minutes at 200°C, or until cooked through, turning halfway.

on_enter.say: Place the chicken, breast side down, in the large air-fryer drawer and press down. Cook for 50 minutes at 200°C, or until cooked through, turning halfway.

steps.descr: Place the cauliflower in the small drawer and cook for...
steps.instructions: Place the cauliflower in the small drawer and cook for 50 minutes at 200°C, draining and adding the chickpeas halfway.

on_enter.say: Place the cauliflower in the small drawer and cook for 50 minutes at 200°C, draining and adding the chickpeas halfway.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, for the sauce, peel the onion, garlic and...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, for the sauce, peel the onion, garlic and ginger, deseed the chilli, then finely slice it all. Finely chop the coriander stalks, reserving the leaves.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, for the sauce, peel the onion, garlic and ginger, deseed the chilli, then finely slice it all. Finely chop the coriander stalks, reserving the leaves.

steps.descr: Put a large non-stick pan on a medium heat on the hob...
steps.instructions: Put a large non-stick pan on a medium heat on the hob with 1 tablespoon of oil, the spices and the curry leaves. Fry for 2 minutes, then add the onion, garlic, ginger, chilli, a pinch of black pepper, the coriander stalks and the tomatoes. Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of curry paste and cook for 15 minutes, or until softened, stirring occasionally.

on_enter.say: Put a large non-stick pan on a medium heat on the hob with 1 tablespoon of oil, the spices and the curry leaves. Fry for 2 minutes, then add the onion, garlic, ginger, chilli, a pinch of black pepper, the coriander stalks and the tomatoes. Stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of curry paste and cook for 15 minutes, or until softened, stirring occasionally.

steps.descr: Stir in the coconut milk, then simmer on a medium-low...
steps.instructions: Stir in the coconut milk, then simmer on a medium-low heat until reduced to a saucy consistency. Season to perfection with salt, pepper and lemon juice.

on_enter.say: Stir in the coconut milk, then simmer on a medium-low heat until reduced to a saucy consistency. Season to perfection with salt, pepper and lemon juice.

steps.descr: Transfer the cooked chicken to a platter with the cauli...
steps.instructions: Transfer the cooked chicken to a platter with the cauli and chickpeas, pour over the curry sauce, and finish with the coriander leaves. Great with fluffy lemon rice, pomegranate-spiked mango chutney, raita and poppadoms.

on_enter.say: Transfer the cooked chicken to a platter with the cauli and chickpeas, pour over the curry sauce, and finish with the coriander leaves. Great with fluffy lemon rice, pomegranate-spiked mango chutney, raita and poppadoms.
